# MVS Solves

> Real automation, done properly. One person — Martin — builds websites, funnels, local presence, automation, AI assistants, and custom systems for small businesses. End to end, no agency, no handoffs.

MVS Solves is a one-person studio. Every engagement starts with a free 30-minute call, followed by a plain-language plan (what, when, how much) and then the build. Contact: martin@mvssolves.com.

## Services

- [Websites built to convert](https://mvssolves.com/#what-i-do): Fast, honest, built to sell — not template soup.
- [Funnels that actually convert](https://mvssolves.com/#what-i-do): One page, one action. Less noise, more bookings.
- [Local presence, owned](https://mvssolves.com/#what-i-do): Google Profile, map-pack visibility, and a steady stream of real 5-stars.
- [Automation, end to end](https://mvssolves.com/#what-i-do): Workflows, integrations, the boring bits handled — so the work runs itself.
- [AI assistants in your voice](https://mvssolves.com/#what-i-do): Booking, FAQs, replies — trained on your business, not a chatbot template.
- [Systems built around your business](https://mvssolves.com/#what-i-do): Internal tools, dashboards, integrations — whatever the off-the-shelf stack can't do.

## Pages

- [Home](https://mvssolves.com/): Overview of services, how it works, and FAQs.
- [Book a call](https://mvssolves.com/book-a-call): Pick a free 30-minute discovery slot.

## How it works

1. We talk for 30 minutes — you tell me what you're trying to fix, build, or automate; I tell you straight if I can help.
2. A plan you can actually read — what I'll build, when it ships, what it costs. One page, no jargon.
3. I build it — drafts before live, then I hand over the keys or stay on to run it.

## Contact

- Email: martin@mvssolves.com
- Booking: https://mvssolves.com/book-a-call
